_comment: Template for ugit's /config.json (lives at device root, NOT in this config/ directory). ugit reads this to (a) connect Wi-Fi and (b) pull firmware updates from a GitHub repo. Copy to /config.json on the device and fill in real values. Never commit a real /config.json -- it contains secrets.
_token_comment: Empty for public repos. For private repos, use a fine-grained PAT scoped to read-only access on this single repo.
_ignore_comment: Paths ugit should NOT pull onto the device. The repo is firmware-only so most files are appropriate -- we only skip host-only metadata. ugit auto-protects /ugit.py, /config.json, /ugit.backup, /ugit_log.txt, /lib, and /sd, so those don't need listing.
